3124920.name: Monday Left Me Broken Collection
3124920.description:
Celebrate the completion of the Monday Left Me Broken trilogy with the Monday Left Me Broken Collection. This collection includes all 3 games in the record breaking series, allowing you to relive these incredible games on Steam.

Monday Left Me Broken 1 is the starting point in the series which set the foundation for all games to come.

The Monday Left Me Broken Cat has forgotten his lyrics! You need to help him! Decide which are the correct lyrics to help him get past his struggle. Make sure you think long and hard so your guesses are accurate or the Monday Left Me Broken Cat will get mad. This game isn't just a quiz; it's an immersive journey into the trend that has captivated millions around the world. Will you help the Monday Left Me Broken Cat or will you watch him fail and suffer the consequences?

Monday Left Me Broken 2 is the inevitable sequel in the Monday left Me Broken series which expanded the scope of what these games would become exponentially.

You stayed too late... You should have left... They are coming... Watch closely and listen carefully as you attempt to survive the onslaught of an angry Monday Left Me Broken Cat along with his succubus friend. You must survive the night by closing the doors to block off the Monday Left Me Broken Cat, manage your goon meter to keep the succubus at bay, and complete lyric questions from Monday Left Me Broken 1 to see past the illusions and look at your camera. Can you endure until morning, or will you fall victim to their rage?

Monday Left Me Broken 3 is the third and final game in the original Monday Left Me Broken trilogy which has been hailed as one of the greatest games of our generation.

Collect all of the Monday Left Me Broken cats in this cheery and long-term gacha game where your true enemy is RNG. While you gain money passively since you have a j*b, you must desperately gamble in hopes of allowing all of the Monday Left Me Broken cats to come home. Unlock everything from the common Monday Left Me Broken Cat to the Legendary black_man.jpeg. Can you collect them all, or will Monday leave you broken… again?

This collection will be updated for any potential future games in the series.
3124920.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
